_meta.notes: Entries are ordered by descending in-game usage. pct is optional and left null when only rank order was recorded. Items/moves/natures with <1% usage are omitted from newer entries (from Gengar onward) to reduce noise.

Charizard._note: Aggregate contains Mega Y / Mega X users picking base + stone. Use Mega Charizard Y / X entries for cleaner per-form data.

Mega Charizard Y._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Charizard; ability pins to Drought and item to charizardite-y on Mega.

Mega Gengar._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Gengar; ability pins to Shadow Tag and item to gengarite on Mega.

Mega Scizor._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Scizor; ability pins to Technician and item to scizorite on Mega.

Aegislash._note: Shield Forme: defensive stance, never attacks. Move pool intentionally empty — decisive power lives on the Blade Forme entry.

Aegislash (Blade Forme)._note: Attacking form — where the damage move pool lives. Pool covers both physical and special sets; default is the common physical spread.

Mega Dragonite._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Dragonite; ability pins to Multiscale and item to dragoninite on Mega.

Basculegion._note: Male form (physical Last Respects). Female form has its own special-attacker entry.

Basculegion (Female)._note: Female form runs a special-attacker set distinct from Male's physical Last Respects spam.

Mimikyu._note: Uses the 'Disguise Disguised' ability key — the default pre-bust state; abilities.json has no plain 'Disguise'.

Mega Lopunny._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Lopunny; ability pins to Scrappy and item to lopunnite on Mega.

Mega Glimmora._note: Damage move pool differs from base Glimmora (different niche on Mega). Default is the 4 before Dazzling Gleam — add Dazzling Gleam as a situational extra in the 5-move pool.

Umbreon._note: Pure support/stall — no damage moves worth tracking. Move pool intentionally empty.

Mega Delphox._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Delphox; ability pins to Levitate and item to delphoxite on Mega.

Mega Lucario._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Lucario; ability pins to Adaptability and item to lucarionite on Mega.

Mega Meganium._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Meganium; ability pins to Mega Sol and item to meganiumite on Mega.

Mega Gyarados._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Gyarados; ability pins to Mold Breaker and item to gyaradosite on Mega.

Mega Greninja._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Greninja; ability pins to Protean and item to greninjite on Mega.

Mega Kangaskhan._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Kangaskhan; ability pins to Parental Bond and item to kangaskhanite on Mega.

Mega Floette._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Floette (Eternal Flower); ability pins to Fairy Aura and item to floettite on Mega.

Mega Venusaur._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Venusaur; ability pins to Thick Fat and item to venusaurite on Mega.

Mega Clefable._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Clefable; ability pins to Magic Bounce and item to clefablite on Mega.

Mega Tyranitar._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Tyranitar; ability pins to Sand Stream and item to tyranitarite on Mega.

Mega Starmie._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Starmie; ability pins to Huge Power and item to starminite on Mega.

Mega Alakazam._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Alakazam; ability pins to Trace and item to alakazite on Mega.

Mega Crabominable._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Crabominable; ability pins to Iron Fist and item to crabominite on Mega.

Mega Hawlucha._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Hawlucha; ability pins to No Guard and item to hawluchanite on Mega.

Mega Beedrill._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Beedrill; ability pins to Adaptability and item to beedrillite on Mega.

Mega Sharpedo._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Sharpedo; ability pins to Strong Jaw and item to sharpedonite on Mega.

Mega Sableye._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Sableye; ability pins to Magic Bounce and item to sablenite on Mega.

Mega Feraligatr._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Feraligatr; ability pins to Dragonize and item to feraligite on Mega.

Mega Aggron._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Aggron; ability pins to Filter and item to aggronite on Mega.

Mega Slowbro._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Slowbro; ability pins to Shell Armor and item to slowbronite on Mega.

Palafin._note: Naive (Zero) Form. Hero Form duplicates this entry — Zero to Hero swaps stats mid-battle, so usage data lives at the species level.

Palafin (Hero Form)._note: Shares usage with the Naive Form (Zero to Hero swaps stats mid-battle).

Mega Aerodactyl._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Aerodactyl; ability pins to Tough Claws and item to aerodactylite on Mega.

Mega Chesnaught._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Chesnaught; ability pins to Bulletproof and item to chesnaughtite on Mega.

Ditto._note: Transform reshapes every slot — moves and the EV/nature matter only after transforming, so we record only ability and held item. Hardy nature is the de-facto neutral default.

Mega Chandelure._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Chandelure; ability pins to Infiltrator and item to chandelurite on Mega.

Mega Heracross._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Heracross; ability pins to Skill Link and item to heracronite on Mega.

Mega Banette._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Banette; ability pins to Prankster and item to banettite on Mega.

Mega Gallade._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Gallade; ability pins to Inner Focus and item to galladite on Mega.

Mega Gardevoir._note: Ability pins to Pixilate and item to gardevoirite on Mega. Pixilate converts Hyper Voice into a Fairy-type spread move, so Mega runs Hyper Voice where base runs Moonblast.

Mega Scovillain._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Scovillain; ability pins to Spicy Spray and item to scovillainite on Mega.

Mega Froslass._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Froslass; ability pins to Snow Warning and item to froslassite on Mega.

Mega Skarmory._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Skarmory; ability pins to Stalwart and item to skarmorite on Mega. Mega runs offensive natures (Jolly / Adamant) whereas base prefers defensive spreads.

Mega Excadrill._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Excadrill; ability pins to Piercing Drill and item to excadrite on Mega.

Mega Victreebel._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Victreebel; ability pins to Innards Out and item to victreebelite on Mega.

Mega Blastoise._note: Damage move pool mirrors base Blastoise; ability pins to Mega Launcher and item to blastoisinite on Mega.

Toxapex._note: Pure support/stall — no damage moves worth tracking.

Dragapult._note: Both physical and special sets are viable. Move pool covers both; default is the common physical spread.
